description_long: This lamp features an intricate, armillary sphere-inspired design with multiple interlocking golden rings forming a globe-like structure. At its center, several small, colored orbs are suspended, suggesting a celestial or planetary motif. The lamp is mounted on a sturdy cylindrical base made of wood and brass, with a marble or stone accent embedded in the lower section. The outermost ring is wide and metallic, providing both structural support and a decorative flourish. The overall aesthetic is reminiscent of antique scientific instruments, blending steampunk and classical elements. The lamp's surface is highly polished, giving it a glossy, reflective finish.
description: A decorative lamp with a golden armillary sphere design, colored orbs at the center, and a wood-brass base with marble accents. The lamp has a glossy, antique scientific instrument appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central colored orbs clearly, with the golden rings and wide metallic band most prominent.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the layered structure of the rings and reveals more of the base's marble accent.
description_view_2: The colored orbs are partially obscured by the rings, and the wood-brass base is more visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the arrangement of the colored orbs and the intersecting rings, with the wood base in full view.
